title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.

With 15+ years building RevOps functions at high-growth B2B SaaS companies, including deep experience scaling Salesforce-driven revenue engines beyond $30M ARR in fintech, I've managed exactly this playbook—building the operational backbone that aligns Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR across distributed teams. I'd love to discuss how I can accelerate your path from strong product-market fit to predictable, scalable revenue operations.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
location: Hybrid (in-office 2x per week at a hub location)

Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales/Finance on territory composition, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in CRM systems.

The hybrid setup in Israel matches his location preferences, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform is an ideal fit for a senior RevOps executive seeking a specialized operations leadership position.

With your Salesforce mastery and track record in pipeline forecasting and GTM strategy, you'd be instrumental in redesigning Gong's territory models for global scalability. I'd love to explore how your RevOps expertise could drive revenue intelligence adoption across Gong's expanding territories.

I've architected GTM data infrastructure and forecasting systems for multiple B2B SaaS companies from Series A through scale, and I'm particularly drawn to health tech given the complexity of their sales cycles and data integrity requirements.
